name: H1 required before first ##
description: Every wiki page must have an H1 header. Tags in frontmatter provide searchable metadata — no mandatory body_text/description between H1 and first subheading.

validation_rules.rule: h1_mandatory -> agent must add a header before any ## sections

agent_instruction: When creating a new page: start with frontmatter, then H1. Tags in frontmatter provide searchable metadata — no mandatory description paragraph needed.

name: Docs page: nav header recommended + See Also section
description: Alternative pattern for docs category pages. Tags in frontmatter provide searchable metadata — no mandatory intro paragraph between H1 and ##.

validation_rules.rule: nav_header_recommended -> every doc page SHOULD have prev/next/index links at top (except docs-index.md)
see_also_section_recommended -> every doc page SHOULD end with ## See Also section linking to wiki/entities/ and wiki/concepts/

agent_instruction: When creating docs category pages: after frontmatter and H1, add tags for searchability. Navigation header and See Also are recommended but not mandatory.

name: Resource page structure
description: Pages with category:resource (application templates, config examples, code scaffolds).
pattern: Description of how to apply this template
Link back to the documentation this was extracted from

validation_rules.rule: template_code_in_code_block → always wrap template content in triple-backtick blocks
usage_section → describe where and how the template is applied
source_link → link to the original documentation page or raw source

agent_instruction: When creating a resource page: wrap template content in code blocks, add Usage and Source sections. DO NOT save to wiki/templates/ — that directory is for page structure JSON only.

name: Date Convention Rule
description: Date usage rules for metadata and logs.

rules.frontmatter_date: Current system date in YYYY-MM-DD format. Never derived from source filename or git commit dates.
